rationale: The cited paper appears only as a grouped, illustrative reference in the general discussion when the authors speculate about cues that may trigger suspicion or counterarguing. It is not used to develop the focal hypotheses, define key constructs, justify the experimental design, or interpret the main results. The paper's core mechanism and tests center on reactance and visible firm effort using other foundational citations. So this citation functions as peripheral background rather than a meaningful input to the study.
